# fileID

**Instance Property**

The item’s file identifier.

## Declaration

```swift
var fileID: FSItem.Identifier { get set }
```

## Working with identifier attributes

- **parentID**: The identifier of the item’s parent.

items.description: The identifier of the item’s parent.
items.name: parentID

title: fileID
